title: Coruscant One
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Coruscant One''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] above [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic era|era]]. It contained a [[Coruscant Control Tower One|control tower]] and [[Gamma Section]] which presumably held [[Gamma-class assault shuttle|''Gamma''-class Assault Shuttles]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''
